SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a user in the application.

Stores user information retrieved from Firebase Firestore, including identifying details, roles, related events, and settings.

  • Constructor Summary

    Creates a new User object with the provided information.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String id, String name, String email, String phone, String image, Boolean isAdmin, ArrayList<String> events, ArrayList<String> organizedEvents, Map<String,Object> settings, Map<String,String> fcmTokens)
      Creates a new User object with the provided information.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier for the user (typically the device ID)
      name - user's display name
      email - user's email address
      phone - user's phone number
      image - URL of the user's profile image
      isAdmin - role assigned to the user (e.g., entrant, organizer, admin)
      events - list of event IDs associated with the user
      settings - map of user-specific configuration settings
      fcmTokens - map of device tokens

      Returns unique identifier for the user

    • addFCMToken

      public void addFCMToken(String deviceId, String token)
      Adds/updates a fcm token for a specific device.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device's unique id number
      token - the device's unique fcm token

    • setFCMTokens

      public void setFCMTokens(HashMap<String,String> tokens)
      Sets the fcm tokens for all the devices for the user
      Parameters:
      tokens - the user's new fcm tokens (one per device)

    • getFCMTokens

      public Map<String,String> getFCMTokens()
      Returns the fcm tokens for the user
      Returns:
      the user's fcm tokens
